title: TAIL
abstract: An empennage (10), including: at least one stabilizing surface (12A), being controllably rotatable around a fuselage (30).
claims: Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1. An empennage (10), comprising: - at least one stabilizing surface (12A), being controllably rotatable around a fuselage (30). 2. An empennage (10) according to claim 1, wherein said at least one stabilizing surface (12A) comprises at least two stabilizing surfaces (12A, 12B) , thereby allowing forming a V-tail empennage (62). 3. An empennage (10) according to claim 1, wherein said at least one stabilizing surface (12A) comprises at least three stabilizing surfaces (12A, 12B), thereby allowing forming either a V-tail empennage (62) or a conventional empennage (60) comprising two horizontal stabilizing surfaces (32) and a vertical stabilizing surface (36). 4. An empennage (10) according to claim 1, further comprising: - a mechanism (64) for rotating said at least one stabilizing surface (12A) around said fuselage (30), said mechanism (64) comprising a motor (24) and at least one gear (20, 24). 5. An empennage (10) according to claim 1, wherein said at least one stabilizing surface (12A) comprises a rudder (34).
